data.name: Dream Girls Collection
data.detailed_description:
Hello! We want to meet you! There are different animal girls among us, we live in different biomes, and we have different habits and characters. Someone is gentle, and it is better not to get close to someone. Who do you like the most?

CHARACTERS



Milk girl
Height: 166 cm
Three sizes: B97 / W58 / H93
Birthday July 5
Herbivorous
Habitat - Fields
Favorite food - Grass, oats.
TEMPER
Hi! I'm a very gentle girl, really, really! I really like to lie in the sun on the juicy grass and soak… Juicy grass by the way, this is my weakness… And in the morning, you will always have a glass of warm milk!


Tropical girl
Height: 166 cm
Three sizes: B97 / W58 / H93
Birthday December 11
Herbivorous
Habitat - Jungle
Favorite food - Bananas, leaves.
TEMPER
I am very playful and energetic! I can play, run and jump all day long! Come on, catch up with me… What, don't you want? Also tell me that you don't climb trees!


Snow leopard
Height: 166 cm
Three sizes: B97 / W58 / H93
Birthday April 29
Predator
Habitat - Taiga
Favorite food - Meat, fish.
TEMPER
I am a thoughtful, prudent girl, and very patient. There is no hurry in the snowy taiga. Your booty from you will not go anywhere, Arr! What did you think? Here you either have an icy heart or you are prey!

FEATURES


  • Puzzle game
  • Beautiful artwork
  • Animated characters
  • Relaxing music
  • CG Gallery Mode

    Rotate mosaics to make a picture.

data.short_description: Hello! We want to meet you! There are different animal girls among us, we live in different biomes, and we have different habits and characters. Someone is gentle, and it is better not to get close to someone. Who do you like the most?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 RAM MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: with 1 GB VRAM compatible with DirectX
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Compatible with DirectX
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 (or equivalent)
  • Memory: 4 RAM MB RAM
  • Graphics: with 1 GB VRAM compatible with DirectX
  • Storage: 800 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Compatible with DirectX
  • Additional Notes: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
